title: GIS Analyst
description: Support city GIS operations, parcel data maintenance, zoning layers, web maps, public works datasets, and ArcGIS Enterprise services for planning and infrastructure teams.
requirements: ArcGIS Pro, ArcGIS Online, ArcGIS Enterprise, Python scripting, SQL, parcel data, zoning, land use, and clear communication with city departments.

title: Planning Technician
description: Maintain planning datasets, review addresses and zoning records, prepare maps for staff reports, and help publish public-facing planning information.
requirements: GIS, zoning, land use, parcels, addresses, ArcGIS Online, metadata, public sector data, and customer service.

title: Geospatial Data Analyst
description: Analyze real estate, transportation, demographic, and parcel datasets for location intelligence dashboards and site selection workflows.
requirements: Python, SQL, PostGIS, GeoPandas, spatial analysis, dashboard development, land use data, and client-ready documentation.

title: Senior GIS Manager
description: Lead enterprise GIS strategy, manage a GIS team, direct utility asset programs, and oversee budgets across multiple departments.
requirements: Senior leadership, manager experience, 10+ years GIS, ArcGIS Enterprise administration, utilities, and director-level stakeholder management.

title: Transportation Planning Analyst
description: Support corridor studies, transportation planning maps, open data dashboards, permit and parcel analysis, and spatial analysis for growth planning.
requirements: Urban planning, transportation, GIS, ArcGIS Pro, web GIS, Python automation, public agency coordination, and data analyst experience.
